title: Gate broad proof on recurring friction and structured escalation

non_goals: Do not suppress required high-risk proof; require an explicit escalation record instead.
Do not reintroduce a standalone proof/test matrix; build on #2333's existing config and Verification route authority.

effects: Persistent session evidence classifies slow validation as proof-route friction input.
Proof output exposes a structured broad-proof escalation gate with explicit override, route-maintenance, and friction-evidence inputs.
Generic broad fallback no longer counts as sufficient escalation authority on its own.
excluded: Work outside the bounded closeout scope.

next_action: Gate broad or high-cost proof behind structured escalation, route-friction evidence, or explicit override without restoring standalone matrix authority.
